name: procurement managers in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify, processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement managers in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify processing 10–20 invoices/month, inconsistent vendor performance tracking causes missed discounts and late orders. We compile vendor performance scorecards and email monthly summaries instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
target_audience: procurement managers in mid-sized e-commerce companies using Shopify, processing 10–20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Inconsistent vendor performance tracking leads to missed discounts and late orders.
features: manual input option for vendor data
